allies.rationale_text: Emergence gives self-organization-and-emergent-order the system-level lens for understanding how coherent patterns arise from local interactions.
allies.source_quote: A coherent whole comes into existence through the integration and synthesis of many components.

allies.rationale_text: Feedback-loops help self-organization-and-emergent-order explain how local responses stabilize, amplify, or redirect distributed behavior.
allies.source_quote: Order depends on interactions and the signals circulating among parts of the system.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Self-organization-and-emergent-order conflicts with authority-bias when top-down directives suppress adaptive local coordination.
structured_tensions.source_quote: self-organization-and-emergent-order conflicts with authority-bias (authority bias) when top-down directives suppress adaptive local coordination.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Self-organization-and-emergent-order conflicts with status-quo-bias when legacy structures block emergent reconfiguration.
structured_tensions.source_quote: self-organization-and-emergent-order conflicts with status-quo-bias (status quo bias) when legacy structures block emergent reconfiguration.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Self-organization-and-emergent-order conflicts with confirmation-bias when motivated reasoning filters out disconfirming signals that emergent patterns need to revise the prevailing model.
structured_tensions.source_quote: self-organization-and-emergent-order conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when motivated reasoning filters out disconfirming signals that emergent patterns need to revise the prevailing model.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved one emergence ally and one feedback ally to keep the first-order surface clean and inspectable.
donor_drops: Did not preserve broader governance and ecology sprawl beyond the clearest current-vocabulary seams.
open_questions: Additional centralized-control tensions are source-real, but the first-order surface is cleanest through emergence and feedback-loops.
